copy:
Scholarship Info

We are thrilled to announce The Boise Trails Challenge Jason Delgadillo Memorial Scholarship Fund. The scholarship aims to recognize outstanding achievements, both academically and within the community. To apply, interested candidates are required to complete the online form here. Please note that in order to upload necessary documents, applicants are required to sign-in with a Google account. We highly encourage eligible students to apply and take advantage of this wonderful opportunity.

What is the Boise Trails Challenge Jason Delgadillo Memorial Scholarship Fund?

This scholarship was created to memorialize the life of Boise Trails Challenge creator Jason Delgadillo. This $2,000 scholarship is open to all Boise Trails challenge participants seeking higher education at an accredited school. The funds must be used during the school year directly following the scholarship fund. Funds may not be deferred or held for later use.

Who is eligible to apply?

Open to all Boise Trails Challenge participants who are seeking further education. Applicants will need to have graduated high school or completed GED requirements prior to the June 18, 2026 start date, and are planning to enroll or are currently enrolled in an accredited college, university, technical or trade school. Applicants will need to complete at least 50% of the 2026 Boise Trails Challenge in the allotted timeframe. This $2,000 one-time scholarship is not renewable, but applicants and scholarship winners can reapply each year. Application requirements and access to the form can be found here. The submission deadline is July 28, 2026. A committee will select the recipient(s). Winner(s) will be notified and announced at the Boise Trails Challenge after party. 

How do I apply?

To apply, interested candidates are required to complete the online form here. Please note that in order to upload necessary documents, applicants are required to sign-in with a Google account. As part of the application, you will need to provide:

  • Personal information
  • Boise Trails Challenge user name
  • High school info
  • Post-secondary education
  • High School diploma or GED OR most recent secondary education transcript
  • Personal statement

What are the selection criteria?

In order to be selected for the scholarship, you must be a registered Boise Trails challenge participant seeking further education and complete at least 50% of the 2025 Boise Trails Challenge.

When is the application due?

The deadline for submitting your application is July 28, 2026 at 11:59pm MST.

How do I know if I'm selected for the scholarship?

Applicants will be notified of the selection committee’s decision by July 30, 2026. The winner(s) will be publicly announced at the Boise Trails Challenge after party.

How will I receive the scholarship funds?

If awarded, Boise Trails will forward a check directly to the institution for credit to the student’s account.

Who do I contact if I want more information?

For more information on the Boise Trails Challenge scholarship program, email help@boisetrails.com.
